---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug on the IMC Hub website
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, iOS 17)
- **Device:** (e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24)
- **URL:** (the page where the bug occurs)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the issue here.
